case_title: OMAR DE LA ROSA VS. BONNEVILLE INTERNATIONAL CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DE LA ROSA, OMAR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BONNEVILLE INTERNATIONAL CORPORATION $2,046.00 PRINCIPAL, $86.26 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,132.26, THE COURT FINDS THE SEPERATION AGREEMENT DID NOT EXPRESSLY LIMIT THE TIME FOR WHICH EDUCATIONAL EXPENSES WOULD BE REIMBURSED AND WILL NOT IMPLY SUCH A TERM AS THE DOCUMENT WAS PREPARED BY DEFENDANT. FURTHER, THE TIME WHEN PLAINTIFF'S REIMBURSEMENT REQUEST WAS SUBMITTED WAS NOT INHERENTLY UNREASONABLE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,046.00 FILED BY DE LA ROSA, OMAR AS TO DEFENDANT BONNEVILLE INTERNATIONAL CORPORATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-02-2009 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM MARK SCHREIBER FILED BY DE LA ROSA, OMAR BONNEVILLE INTERNATIONAL CORPORATION
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-02-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-02-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: MARK SCHREIBER. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT BONNEVILLE INTERNATIONAL CORPORATION
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$36.25) SERVED SEP-09-2009, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BONNEVILLE INTERNATIONAL CORPORATION
COPY PROVIDED THE COURT OF CORRESPONDENCE FROM DEFENDANT TO PLAINTIFF RE PAYMENT OF JUDGMENT.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JAN-04-2010 ORDERED DESTROYED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-02-2009 - JUDGMENT.
